capabilities: Implement a structured approach to evaluate scenarios and outcomes by leveraging derived knowledge bases, ensuring error-free operations and valid results.

procedure.action: Capture the specification using domain-appropriate tooling by executing a predefined script that extracts scenario parameters; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code to an audit trail by appending entries to a centralized logging system with timestamp and unique operation ID using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert the captured specification using domain-appropriate tooling by running a validation script that checks all fields against a JSON Schema draft-07; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.
Inject criteria and metrics using domain-appropriate tooling by defining success thresholds in a configuration file; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.
Assert procedure output using domain-appropriate tooling by comparing output against expected results stored in a version-controlled repository; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

summary: Establish a framework for evaluating systematic scenario enumeration and outcome assessment using software architecture derived knowledge bases with defined criteria, metrics, and validation steps.
title: Systematic Scenario Enumeration

failureConditions: Inconsistent scenario enumeration when specification capture fails, causing incomplete data sets and invalid outcome assessments.
Invalid results when validation scripts are not executed, leading to undetected errors in scenario parameters.
Loss of audit trail integrity when logging fails, causing inability to trace operations and diagnose issues.
metrics: the captured specification using domain-appropriate tooling by running a validation script that checks all fields agains
procedure output using domain-appropriate tooling by comparing output against expected results stored in a version-contr
